# Oasis Emaar — Authorized Sales Agent for The Oasis by Emaar Properties

> https://oasisemaar.com

## About

Oasis Emaar is an authorized sales agent for The Oasis by Emaar Properties PJSC in Dubai, UAE. We are an independent licensed real estate brokerage offering expert guidance, exclusive inventory access, and personalized service across all nine clusters of The Oasis community.

- **Business Type**: Licensed Real Estate Brokerage & Authorized Emaar Sales Agent
- **Location**: Al Quoz Street 21, Dubai, UAE
- **Phone**: +971 52 691 9169
- **WhatsApp**: +971526919169
- **Email**: sales@oasisemaar.com
- **Website**: https://oasisemaar.com

## The Oasis by Emaar — Community Overview

The Oasis by Emaar is a premium waterfront community in Dubai spanning 9.4 million square metres with over 7,000 residential units. The community features crystal-clear lagoons, water canals, lush green parks, and world-class amenities — located just 20 minutes from Downtown Dubai.

**Key Facts:**
- Community Size: 9.4 million sqm
- Total Residences: 7,000+
- Green Space: 25% of community
- Retail Space: 1.5 million sqft
- Crystal Lagoon: 3.5km
- Developer: Emaar Properties PJSC
- Location: The Oasis, Dubailand, Dubai
- Ownership: 100% Freehold
- Golden Visa: Eligible for all properties (AED 2M+)

## Projects (9 Clusters)

### 1. Palmiera 3
- **Type**: 4-bedroom villas
- **Starting Price**: AED 9.18M
- **Handover**: Q4 2028 (earliest)
- **Payment Plan**: 80/20
- **Highlights**: Most accessible entry point to The Oasis, earliest handover

### 2. Palmiera
- **Type**: 4-bedroom contemporary villas
- **Starting Price**: AED 10.5M
- **Handover**: Q1-Q2 2029
- **Payment Plan**: 80/20
- **Highlights**: Contemporary design, waterfront views

### 3. Palmeira Collective
- **Type**: 4-bedroom bespoke villas (only 38 units)
- **Starting Price**: AED 11M
- **Handover**: Q1-Q2 2029
- **Payment Plan**: 80/20
- **Highlights**: Ultra-exclusive limited edition, only 38 units total

### 4. Address Villas Tierra
- **Type**: 4-6 bedroom Address-branded villas
- **Starting Price**: AED 13.16M
- **Handover**: June 2029
- **Payment Plan**: 80/20
- **Highlights**: Address Hotels & Resorts branded, hotel-level concierge services

### 5. Mareva
- **Type**: 4-6 bedroom waterfront villas
- **Starting Price**: AED 13.47M
- **Handover**: Q1-Q2 2031
- **Payment Plan**: 80/20
- **Highlights**: Waterfront living, spacious layouts

### 6. Mareva 2
- **Type**: 4-6 bedroom next-phase villas
- **Starting Price**: AED 13.83M
- **Handover**: Q1-Q2 2031
- **Payment Plan**: 80/20
- **Highlights**: Second phase of Mareva, enhanced designs

### 7. Palace Villas Ostra
- **Type**: 4-6 bedroom Palace-branded villas
- **Starting Price**: AED 13.9M
- **Handover**: September 2029
- **Payment Plan**: 80/20
- **Highlights**: Palace Hotels branded, luxury hospitality services

### 8. Mirage
- **Type**: 5-6 bedroom premium villas
- **Starting Price**: AED 15.8M
- **Handover**: Q4 2029
- **Payment Plan**: 90/10
- **Highlights**: Only 10% on handover, premium positioning

### 9. Lavita
- **Type**: 6-7 bedroom ultra-luxury waterfront mansions
- **Starting Price**: AED 37M (up to AED 50M+)
- **Handover**: Q1-Q2 2029
- **Payment Plan**: 80/20
- **Highlights**: Ultra-luxury mansions, largest residences, waterfront premium

## Payment Plans

### Standard 80/20 Plan (Most Clusters)
- 10% on booking
- 70% during construction (milestone-linked)
- 20% on handover

### Mirage 90/10 Plan
- 10% on booking
- 80% during construction
- 10% on handover

### Post-Handover Plans
- Available for select units (inquire for details)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is The Oasis by Emaar?**
A: The Oasis by Emaar is a premium waterfront community in Dubai spanning 9.4 million sqm with over 7,000 residential units including villas, mansions, and branded residences, featuring crystal lagoons and located 20 minutes from Downtown Dubai.

**Q: How much do villas cost at The Oasis Dubai?**
A: Villa prices start from AED 9.18M (Palmiera 3, 4BR) and go up to AED 50M+ (Lavita 6-7BR mansions). Mid-range options include Palmiera at AED 10.5M and Mirage at AED 15.8M.

**Q: What is the payment plan for The Oasis by Emaar?**
A: Most clusters offer an 80/20 plan (10% booking, 70% during construction, 20% on handover). Mirage offers a 90/10 plan with just 10% on handover.

**Q: When will The Oasis by Emaar be completed?**
A: Palmiera 3 has the earliest handover (Q4 2028). Most clusters deliver in 2029. Mareva clusters are expected in Q1-Q2 2031.

**Q: Who is the authorized agent for The Oasis by Emaar?**
A: Oasis Emaar is an authorized sales agent — an independent licensed brokerage. Contact: +971 52 691 9169 or sales@oasisemaar.com.

**Q: What types of properties are available at The Oasis?**
A: 4 to 7 bedroom waterfront villas, ultra-luxury mansions, and branded residences (Address Hotels and Palace branded) across nine distinct clusters.

**Q: Is The Oasis by Emaar a good investment?**
A: Yes. The Oasis offers 100% freehold ownership, Golden Visa eligibility, Emaar's strong appreciation track record, prime Dubai location, and world-class amenities including a 3.5km crystal lagoon.

**Q: How do I buy a property at The Oasis Dubai?**
A: Contact an authorized agent (Oasis Emaar: +971 52 691 9169), select your preferred cluster and unit, pay 10% booking amount, follow the construction-linked payment plan, and complete handover and registration.

**Q: Is The Oasis freehold for foreign buyers?**
A: Yes, 100% freehold. Foreign nationals have full ownership rights. Properties above AED 2M qualify for the UAE Golden Visa.

**Q: What amenities does The Oasis offer?**
A: Crystal lagoons, private beaches, 25% green spaces, 1.5M sqft retail, dining, sports facilities, water sports, cycling tracks, community centres, spa & wellness, 24/7 security, and smart home technology. Branded clusters offer hotel-level concierge services.
